activity_question: What did the astronauts have to readjust to after returning?
follow_up_question: How do you think it would feel to walk after being in zero gravity for months?

title: Piggly Wiggly: Shopping Revolution Begins
story: Grab a basket and explore! In 1916, Clarence Saunders changed grocery shopping forever. On September 11, he opened the first Piggly Wiggly store in Memphis, Tennessee. This wasn't just any market - it was America's first true self-service supermarket. Customers could wander the aisles, pick their own items, and pay at the end. No more waiting for clerks to fetch everything!
activity_question: What made Piggly Wiggly different from other stores?
activity_choices: It was America's first true self-service supermarket
It was run by actual pigs
It was the biggest store in Tennessee
activity_answer: It was America's first true self-service supermarket
follow_up_question: Why do you think Clarence Saunders chose the name 'Piggly Wiggly' for his store?

title: Speedy Stan: Australia's Olympic Star
story: Lightning-fast Stan Rowley raced into the world in 1876. Born in Young, Australia, he grew up to become a sprinting sensation. On September 11, years later, Rowley dashed to glory at the 1900 Olympics. He snagged a shiny gold medal in the 5,000m team event and zoomed to bronze in the 60m, 100m, and 200m races. Talk about fleet feet!
activity_question: What color medals did Stan Rowley win at the Olympics?
follow_up_question: Can you name the town in Australia where Stan Rowley was born?

title: A Sunshine Singer's Bright Beginning
story: Jimmie Davis, the voice behind the beloved song 'You Are My Sunshine', took his first breath in Quitman, Louisiana on September 11, 1899. This talented musician would go on to become a famous American singer and songwriter, spreading joy through his music for decades to come.
activity_question: What famous song is Jimmie Davis known for?
follow_up_question: Have you ever heard 'You Are My Sunshine'? How does the song make you feel?
